# CWE-322 vulnerable: Key Exchange without Entity Authentication (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-322-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

// ConnectPeerRelay dials a relay host without verifying its identity.
func ConnectPeerRelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	peerHost := r.FormValue("relay_host")
	conn, err := tls.Dial("tcp", peerHost, &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true})
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	defer conn.Close()
	payload, err := io.ReadAll(conn)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	w.Write(payload)
}
